ev-forest-to-dragon: intro.text:
Exiting the forest, you see the the entrance of a huge cave.

From the burn marks and the size of the claws imprinted you have no doubts.

You are here...

ops.text:
YES!

I'll rush into the cave!

Foreplay be damned!

Let's move silently though the cave.

The claw marks seem fresh...

I have a bad feeling about this

ev-forest-to-dragon: moving silently.text:
The entrance give way to a widely open cave.

The floor is made of lose stones slabs.

This will be dificult.

ops.text:
I can handle it...

Let's keep moving with caution.

My boner will not last enolugh...

CHARGE!!

ev-forest-to-dragon: moving silentliy 2.text:
The stone slavs are replaced by a pile of bones that crack under your feet.

Moving slowly will take a very long time...

ops.text:
There is no problem...

I will move at my own pace...

I'll rather live slowly than die fast...

I can't take forever...

I'll sprint-crouch...

Swift as a hare...
Deadly as a scorpion...

ev-forest-to-dragon: too cautions death.text:
You move...
Step by step...
Mmeasuring each one...
Focused...
To not make a noise...

Your focus is interrupted, when a warm exhalation hit's you in the head...

ops.text:
If I don't look up, nothing will happen to me...

Those streams of saliva to my left and right are just bat droppings...

I'm pretty sure of it.

(Game over)

I lift my head in glorious anticipation...

"Please mighty dragon! Swallow me whole!"

(Vore scene)

ev-forest-to-dragon: vore scene.text:
Lifting your head, you can only see the massive tongue and throat of the dragon.

Strangely, instead of killing you instantly...
You feel their tongue wrapping around you.

It lifts you inside their throat...

ops.text:
I hug their wet soft tongue.

I want to savor every moment of this wonderfull blanket.

Let me go down there!

I focus my gaze in their throat!.

I let their warm breat cover me to from head to toes.

ev-forest-to-dragon: vore scene ending 2.text:
As you embrace this situation with joyfull cooperation.

Their throat starts to squish you and cover you in saliva as you go to black.

You worm deeper, following their throat movements...

ops.text:
I ride this tunnel...

I make my best impression of a worm, wiggling my way down...

I want to make this feeling my last...

(Game over)

I swim down faster than a lubricated pill.

I'll get in their warm, slick, dark, and small stomach.

You go on with the story, I'll rest here a while...

(Game over)

ev-forest-to-dragon: move fastly.text:
You move like a feather blown by the wind.

A divine strike of swiftness moves across your entire body and now the bones are behind you.

Now, you have your last obstacle ahead, you find  the dragon resting in front of you.

ops.text:
YES!
Ok ok...

Calm down...
Just like you practiced...
